meta.onboarding: Choose your chapter — GDG Japan Accounts
meta.developerAppsNew: Create an OIDC client — GDG Japan Accounts
meta.developerAppsDetail: Manage OIDC client — GDG Japan Accounts

memberships.heading: Your chapters
memberships.description: Track your membership status and the actions available to you.
memberships.cancelDescription: Your request will be removed. You can request to join again later.

noChapter.title: No chapter yet
noChapter.description: Pick a GDG or GDGoC chapter to request membership. An organizer will approve your request.

pending.description: An organizer will review your request soon. You'll get full access once approved.

active.memberDesc: You're an active member of this chapter.
active.organizerDesc: You can review pending requests and manage members.

superAdmin.title: Super admin tools
superAdmin.description: Manage user access, GDG Japan chapters, and every join request.

developerApps.title: OIDC clients
developerApps.description: Use GDG Accounts sign-in in a service you develop.

roleTools.heading: Your tools
roleTools.description: Extra tools are available based on your chapter role and account access.

organizerTools.title: Chapter organizer tools
organizerTools.description: Review incoming requests and keep your chapter's member list up to date.

access.title: Active chapter membership required
access.description: Only active members of a GDG or GDGoC chapter can register and manage OIDC clients. If your request is pending, wait for an organizer to approve it.

list.title: OIDC clients
list.subtitle: Manage clients that use GDG Accounts as their OpenID Connect provider.
list.emptyDescription: Create your first confidential web client to get a Client ID and Client Secret.

create.title: Create an OIDC client
create.subtitle: Configure a confidential OpenID Connect client for a server-side web application.
create.cardDescription: Configure the client identity, redirect URIs, and scopes it may request. You can change these settings later.
create.beforeYouStartDescription: Redirect URIs are matched exactly. Register the HTTPS URLs your application actually uses.
create.basicsDescription: The client type and information used to identify it in this console.
create.redirectsDescription: Register the URLs users may safely return to after authentication or sign-out.

detail.subtitle: Manage credentials, redirect URIs, scopes, and client status.
detail.credentialsDescription: Use these credentials only on your application's server.
detail.settingsDescription: Changes to redirect URIs and scopes take effect immediately.
detail.dangerDescription: Disabling or deleting a client revokes its existing access and refresh tokens.
detail.disableDescription: Stop new sign-ins and revoke the client's current access.
detail.enableDescription: Allow new sign-ins again. Previously revoked tokens stay revoked.
detail.deleteDescription: Permanently remove this client, its credentials, and its active access.

fields.applicationTypeDescription: Currently supported for web applications that can store a Client Secret securely on the server.
fields.name: Client name
fields.nameDescription: Used to identify the client in this console. It is not shown to end users.
fields.appUrlDescription: Enter the public home page for the application.
fields.redirectUrisDescription: Callback destinations after authentication. Up to 10. HTTPS is required except for localhost and loopback development URLs.
fields.postLogoutRedirectUrisDescription: Optional. Up to 10. Users may return to these exact URIs after signing out.
fields.scopesDescription: openid is always required. Select the additional information and capabilities your app may request.

scope.profile: Read the user's name and profile image.
scope.offline_access: Receive refresh tokens for offline access.
scope.chapters: Read the user's active chapter memberships and roles.

security.title: Confidential web application
security.description: Authorization Code with PKCE S256 and client_secret_basic are required. Never place the Client Secret in browser or mobile code.

secret.title: Save your Client Secret now
secret.description: This is the only time the Client Secret will be shown. Store it securely before leaving this page.
secret.notShown: The existing Client Secret cannot be displayed again. Rotate it if it has been lost or exposed.

dialog.rotateDescription: The current secret will stop working immediately. Update your application with the new secret before users sign in again.
dialog.enableDescription: Users will be able to sign in again. Tokens revoked while the client was disabled will not be restored.
dialog.disableDescription: Sign-in will stop and all existing access and refresh tokens will be revoked immediately.
dialog.deleteDescription: All credentials and tokens will be revoked. This action cannot be undone.

errors.title: Couldn't save the client
errors.create: Check the application details and redirect URIs, then try again.
errors.update: The operation could not be completed. Check the settings and try again.

chapters.title: Chapters
chapters.subtitle: Browse all GDG and GDGoC chapters. Join the ones you belong to — an organizer will approve your request.

empty.title: No chapters yet
empty.description: No chapters are available yet. Please check back later.

leaveDialog.title: Leave {{name}}?
leaveDialog.desc: You'll lose member access immediately. You can request to rejoin later.

search.placeholder: Search chapters by name or slug
search.noMatchesDescription: Try a different name, slug, or membership filter.

state.joinableDescription: Request to join this chapter and an organizer will review it.
state.pendingDescription: Your membership request is waiting for organizer approval.
state.memberDescription: You are an active member of this chapter.
state.organizerDescription: You organize this chapter and can manage its members.

adminRequests.title: Join requests
adminRequests.subtitle: Every pending join request across all chapters.

adminUsers.title: Manage users
adminUsers.subtitle: Manage GDG Japan Accounts users, privileges, and sign-in sessions.

dialog.promoteDescription: They will be able to manage all chapters, join requests, and users.
dialog.demoteDescription: They will return to a regular user and lose access to administration tools.
dialog.revokeDescription: They will be signed out of Accounts and connected apps, and must sign in again.

errors.lastAdmin: The final admin cannot be demoted.
errors.selfRevoke: You cannot revoke your own session here. Sign out from the account menu instead.
errors.selfAdmin: You cannot change your own admin access. Ask another administrator.
errors.unknown: The operation could not be completed.

adminSeed.title: Trusted OAuth clients
adminSeed.description: Synchronize the built-in applications with the current Worker configuration.
adminSeed.noticeDescription: This idempotent operation writes configured tinyurl, wiki, img, and scheduler clients to D1.

onboarding.title: Choose your chapter
onboarding.subtitle: Pick the GDG or GDGoC chapter you belong to. An organizer will approve your request.

empty.title: No chapters yet
empty.description: No chapters are available yet. Please check back later.

admin.title: Manage chapters
admin.subtitle: Create chapters and manage their membership and organizer teams.

create.description: Add a GDG or GDGoC chapter to the Accounts directory.

list.name: Name
list.dialogDesc: Members will lose their membership. This action cannot be undone.

organize.title: Organize {{chapter}}
organize.subtitle: Review requests first, then maintain roles and membership for this chapter.
organize.pendingDescription: Approve people who belong here, or reject requests that should not join.
organize.membersDescription: Roles determine who can review requests and manage this chapter.

search.placeholder: Search members by name or email

dialog.promoteDescription: Organizers can review requests and manage other chapter members.
dialog.demoteDescription: They will no longer be able to review requests or manage this chapter.
dialog.removeDescription: They will lose active membership immediately and can request to rejoin later.
dialog.rejectDescription: Their pending request will be removed. They can submit a new request later.

signin.title: Sign in
signin.subtitle: Use your Google account to continue.
signin.welcome: One account for your GDG Japan chapters and developer tools.
signin.secure: You'll choose a Google account on the next screen.

consent.title: Authorize {{appName}}?
consent.description: Review what this application wants to access before continuing.
consent.privacy: Only approve applications you trust. You can revoke access by contacting the application owner.

scope.profile: View your name and profile image
scope.offline_access: Keep access when you are away
scope.chapters: View your active chapter memberships and roles

errors.alreadyInChapter: You're already part of this chapter.
errors.lastOrganizer: You're the last organizer. Promote someone else first.
errors.cannotSelfRemove: You can't remove yourself this way. Use Leave instead.
errors.slugFormat: Slug must be lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes.
errors.createChapterFailed: Could not create chapter (slug may already exist).
errors.userNotInChapter: User is not in this chapter.
